channel.title: Spring-Data on YoSQL - write more SQL
channel.description: Recent content in Spring-Data on YoSQL - write more SQL

item.title: Spring-Data-JDBC
item.description: The spring-data-jdbc based implementation. It generates Spring-Data repository interfaces that use the entire SQL statements as annotation value. Read Write Call Batch Write Rxjava Stream Eager Stream Lazy ✘ ✘ ✘ ✘ ✘ ✘ ✘

item.title: Spring-Data-JPA
item.description: The spring-data-jpa based implementation. It generates Spring-Data repository interfaces that use the entire SQL statements as annotation value. Read Write Call Batch Write Rxjava Stream Eager Stream Lazy ✘ ✘ ✘ ✘ ✘ ✘ ✘
